title: Teacher Login via Mobile + U-DISE and U-DISE-Filtered Data Across All Pages

requirements.text: Implement teacher login using mobile number and U-DISE number as credentials. On the Login page, the Teacher tab must accept both a mobile number field and a U-DISE number field. Authentication must validate the combination against stored teacher login records (TeacherLogin entries in localStorage). On successful login, store the teacher's U-DISE number in the auth session so all subsequent pages can access it.

quotes: शिक्षक लॉगिन हे मोबाइल नंबर आणि यु डायस नंबर ने व्हावे

acceptanceCriteria: Teacher tab on LoginPage shows both a 'Mobile Number' field and a 'U-DISE Number' field.
Login succeeds only when the mobile number and U-DISE number match a stored TeacherLogin record.
On successful teacher login, the session stores the teacher's U-DISE number.
Invalid combinations show a clear error message.
After login, the teacher is routed to the Home page dashboard.

requirements.text: On the Home page (HomePage.tsx), when a teacher is logged in, display stats (total students, results entered, results pending) and the progress bar filtered exclusively to the logged-in teacher's U-DISE number. Admins continue to see data for all schools.

quotes: त्याच यु डायस नंबर ची माहिती Home page

acceptanceCriteria: Teacher role sees only counts and stats for students/results belonging to their U-DISE number.
Admin role continues to see aggregated data across all schools.
The filtering uses the U-DISE from the teacher's auth session.

requirements.text: On the School Info page (SchoolInfoPage.tsx), when a teacher is logged in, show only the school record matching the teacher's U-DISE number. Add and edit actions should be hidden or disabled for teacher role; only admins can add/edit/delete school records. Admins see all schools.
acceptanceCriteria: Teacher role sees only the single school row whose UDISE matches their session U-DISE.
Add/Edit/Delete buttons are hidden for teacher role on this page.
Admin role sees all schools with full CRUD controls.

requirements.text: On the Teacher Info page (TeacherInfoPage.tsx), when a teacher is logged in, show only teacher records whose U-DISE number matches the logged-in teacher's U-DISE. Admins see all teacher records.
acceptanceCriteria: Teacher role sees only teacher entries with their own U-DISE number.
Admin role sees all teacher records.
The UDISE filter is applied automatically on page load from the session.

requirements.text: On the Student Info page (StudentInfoPage.tsx), when a teacher is logged in, display only students whose school U-DISE matches the logged-in teacher's U-DISE. The UDISE field in the add/edit form should be pre-filled and locked to the teacher's U-DISE. Admins see all students.
acceptanceCriteria: Teacher role sees only students belonging to their U-DISE school.
When a teacher adds a student, the U-DISE field is pre-populated and read-only.
Admin role sees and can manage all students.

requirements.text: On the Enter Results page (EnterResultPage.tsx), when a teacher is logged in, the student list must be filtered to show only students from the teacher's U-DISE school. Admins can see students from all schools.
acceptanceCriteria: Teacher role's student search list is scoped to their U-DISE.
Admin role sees all students in the list.
Results entered by a teacher are correctly associated with their school's U-DISE.

requirements.text: On the Progress Report page (ProgressReportPage.tsx), when a teacher is logged in, pre-fill and lock the U-DISE filter field to the teacher's U-DISE number so they can only view progress reports for their own school's students. Admins can enter any U-DISE.
acceptanceCriteria: U-DISE input on the Progress Report page is pre-filled with the teacher's U-DISE and is read-only for teacher role.
Admin role can freely type any U-DISE.
Progress report results are scoped correctly based on the U-DISE.

requirements.text: On the Student Result Print page (StudentResultPrintPage.tsx), when a teacher is logged in, pre-fill and lock the U-DISE filter to the teacher's U-DISE number so they can only search and print results for their school's students. Admins can enter any U-DISE.
acceptanceCriteria: U-DISE input on the Student Result Print page is pre-filled with the teacher's U-DISE and is read-only for teacher role.
Admin role can freely type any U-DISE.
Print output shows only data for the teacher's school.

requirements.text: Ensure the sidebar navigation (DashboardLayout.tsx) for the teacher role includes links to all the following pages: Home, School Info, Teacher Info, Student Info, Enter Results, Progress Report, and Student Result Print — all visible and accessible to the teacher role.
acceptanceCriteria: Teacher role can see and navigate to: Home, School Info, Teacher Info, Student Info, Enter Results, Progress Report, and Student Result Print.
No page is blocked or hidden from the teacher role except admin-only management pages.
Navigation items correctly label pages in both English and Marathi where applicable.

constraints: All data filtering by U-DISE must use the U-DISE stored in the teacher's auth session — do not rely on URL parameters for security-sensitive filtering.
Admin role must retain full unfiltered access to all pages and data.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
All data storage continues to use localStorage helpers defined in frontend/src/lib/localStorage.ts.
nonGoals: No changes to the Student login tab or Student role behavior.
No backend (Motoko) changes required — all filtering is client-side using localStorage.
No new pages beyond those already listed.
No changes to the Admin login flow.
